mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.5%, tight labor market conditions accelerate wage growth and consumer spending, driving corporate revenue expectations higher and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day forward returns in >60% of instances where UNRATE drops below 5.5%, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts combined with rising industrial production indicate synchronized real-economy expansion, which amplifies corporate profit margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform a baseline buy-and-hold strategy in forward 60-day returns, or the interaction term shows a statistically insignificant coefficient in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: In a rising inflation environment, an accelerating federal funds rate compresses equity valuations by increasing the cost of capital, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive or neutral when both CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS rise simultaneously, or the negative predictive relationship breaks down during periods of explicit forward guidance.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in housing starts reflects improving consumer confidence and credit availability, which supports durable goods manufacturing and retail sales, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The rolling 12-month correlation between HOUST growth and 5-day SPX returns falls below 0.1, or forward returns are statistically indistinguishable from zero across all quarters.

mechanism_narrative: When total nonfarm payrolls exceed 200,000 for three consecutive months, robust employment growth validates economic momentum, reducing recession risk premiums and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are negative or flat in >50% of triggered episodes, or the signal generates excessive false positives during post-pandemic labor market distortions.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real estate activity coupled with stable short-term interest rates signals accommodative financial conditions that fuel equity risk-taking, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to predict positive returns when FEDFUNDS remains flat but HOUST declines, or the interaction effect reverses direction during liquidity crunches.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of accelerating industrial production, if real retail sales growth simultaneously decelerates, supply-demand imbalances compress corporate margins, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises > 0.5% month-over-month while RSAFS falls
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when INDPRO outpaces RSAFS growth, or the margin compression mechanism fails to materialize in forward 20-day price action.
